message:
feat(python): numpy.outer wrapper parity (franken_numpy-bvy5)

Add fnp_python.outer(a, b, out=None) as a passthrough delegator to
np.outer so input flattening, output shape (M, N), dtype promotion,
and the optional `out=` destination kwarg semantics match numpy
exactly across real/complex/integer/2-D inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with six scenarios: float 1-D x
float 1-D, integer 1-D x integer 1-D (exact equality), 2-D input
that numpy flattens, mixed-dtype int+float promotion, complex128 x
complex128, and an out= pre-allocated 3x2 zeros buffer that the
wrapper must populate with the same contents as np.outer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
